Name: MercenaryRankTable
Description: Determines the configuration for LOGHUNT progress, which includes Hunter Class.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Cumulative Points
Fields.Description: The cumulative points required to rank up.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon ID to use for the rank.
